metadata.name: Member Tiers Kafka Consumer
metadata.description: Streaming pipeline that consumes member tier events (upgraded/downgraded) from Confluent Kafka

parameters.name: secret_project
parameters.label: Secret Project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP Project where Kafka credentials are stored in Secret Manager

parameters.name: secret_id
parameters.label: Secret ID
parameters.helpText: Secret Manager secret ID for Kafka credentials (default: loyalty-data-kafka-connect-members)

parameters.name: topic_type
parameters.label: Topic Type
parameters.helpText: Which topic(s) to consume: upgraded, downgraded, or both (default: both)

parameters.name: writer_mode
parameters.label: Writer Mode
parameters.helpText: Which writer mode to use: pyiceberg or beam_iceberg (default: beam_iceberg)

parameters.name: auto_offset_reset
parameters.label: Auto Offset Reset
parameters.helpText: Where to start reading: latest or earliest (default: latest)
